impact: This advances the PP&D plan by documenting how public guidance and form/PDF artifacts will be monitored for changes before any live crawl, document download, raw crawl persistence, or authenticated DevHub automation is introduced.
summary: Add a fixture-only PP&D public change-monitoring plan with deterministic validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-93: Task checkbox-88: Add a fixture-only public PP&D change-monitoring plan that lists one high-change guidance page, one low-change PDF or form artifact, recrawl cadence, hash/header fields, and change-report categories without network access, raw crawl output, or downloaded documents.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
